hero.untertitel: Back to Meaning Maximization connects economic strength with human dignity – for a world where work and life are in balance.

was_ist_btmm.titel: What is Back to Meaning Maximization?
was_ist_btmm.wirtschaft_text: An economic model built on mutual support rather than competition. Shared resources strengthen each individual.
was_ist_btmm.gemeinschaft_text: Local cells form the heart of BtMM. People come together, support each other and shape their economic future collectively.
was_ist_btmm.nachhaltigkeit_text: Planned cooperative (eG) + support association (e.V.). Long-term thinking instead of short-term profit. BtMM builds structures that sustain and grow across generations.

angebote_teaser.text: Somatic body work for more balance and vitality. Individual accompaniment that follows the rhythm of your body – without pressure, without haste.
angebote_teaser.text2: Discover deep relaxation and lasting change in a safe, professional setting in Freiburg. Noticeable changes are possible in 1–3 sessions.

app_teaser.untertitel: Your digital tool for the community
app_teaser.pool_text: Shared resources that benefit every member.
app_teaser.coins_text: Internal currency for exchanging services within the community.
app_teaser.workspace_text: Shared digital workspace for projects and collaboration.

spenden_teaser.text: Your donation helps us build the infrastructure that enables a more just economy. Every contribution counts.

zellen_karte.text: BtMM cells are emerging around the world – local communities that practice economic cooperation.

hero_poetisch: Like a forest, where every tree is carried by the network of roots – an economic system is emerging that strengthens everyone who is part of it.
hero_subtitel2: A universe in the making · Freiburg · Worldwide

infinity.text: The existing system keeps spinning in circles – faster and tighter. Back to Meaning Maximization is the moment the loop breaks open and something new emerges.

mitgliedschaft.untertitel: Four ways to be part of BtMM
